semantic.role: TypeScript interface defining the central configuration schema for the ArchSpine mirror system.
responsibilities: Declares the structure for the system's root configuration object (SpineConfig).
Specifies required schema version and project metadata (name, locales).
Defines optional LLM integration settings (provider, model, baseURL, mode).
Exports the MCPContextMode type for context mode discrimination.
outOfScope: Implementing configuration validation or parsing logic.
Providing default values or environment variable binding.
Handling runtime configuration updates or dynamic reloading.
invariants: Exports the SpineConfig interface as the primary configuration contract.
Relies on imported types (PartialScanPolicy, SchemaVersion) for type safety.
Defines a nested structure for project and LLM settings.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Define a versioned, structured configuration schema to decouple system configuration from implementation details.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: No evidence of recent changes in this file; the git intent 'establish subsystem facades and resolve layer inversions' does not directly apply to this configuration interface.

ruleViolations.reason: Interface 'SpineConfig' does not start with the character 'I' as required by the interface-prefix rule for internal interfaces.

English.role: TypeScript interface defining the central configuration schema for the ArchSpine mirror system.
responsibilities: Declares the structure for the system's root configuration object (SpineConfig).
Specifies required schema version and project metadata such as name and locales.
Defines optional LLM integration settings including provider, model, baseURL, and mode.
Exports the MCPContextMode type for context mode discrimination.
outOfScope: Implementing configuration validation or parsing logic.
Providing default values or environment variable binding.
Handling runtime configuration updates or dynamic reloading.
